holdings.infoBox: KURE is an equity ETF with a total of 50 individual holdings. The top holdings are BeOne Medicines AG stock at 9.20%, Innovent Biologics at 8.36%, WuXi Biologics at 7.44%, WuXi AppTec at 5.90%, and Shenzhen Mindray Bio-Medical Electronics at 4.49%.

overview.description: The KraneShares MSCI All China Health Care Index ETF (KURE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of large- and mid-cap Chinese stocks in the health care sector. KURE was launched on Feb 1, 2018 and is issued by KraneShares.
